# NorthClick

> Professional web design and development agency. We build fast, modern, and affordable websites for businesses worldwide.

NorthClick designs and develops professional websites — from single-page landing pages to full multi-page sites. We serve small and medium businesses that need a serious online presence without enterprise-level prices. Response time under 24 hours. Bilingual service (English / Spanish).

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.northclick.net/): Overview of services, value proposition, testimonials, and how to get started.
- [Services & Pricing](https://www.northclick.net/services.html): Full pricing for all services — landing pages, professional sites, redesigns, SEO, and à la carte add-ons. Includes terms of service.
- [Our Work](https://www.northclick.net/work.html): Portfolio of completed client projects with live links.
- [Contact](https://www.northclick.net/contact.html): Contact form to start a project. Free, no-commitment consultation.

## Services & Pricing

### Landing Page
Single-page conversion-focused website. Includes responsive design, animations, contact form, basic SEO.
- Price: $320 – $800 USD
- Timeline: 5–10 business days

### Professional Website
Multi-page website (up to 5 pages). Custom design, responsive, contact form, SEO setup, Google Analytics.
- Price: $640 – $1,800 USD
- Timeline: 2–4 weeks

### Website Redesign
Full visual and technical overhaul of an existing website. Modern layout, improved UX, mobile-first.
- Price: $400 – $1,600 USD
- Timeline: 1–3 weeks

### SEO Optimization
On-page SEO audit and implementation. Meta tags, structured data (JSON-LD), page speed, sitemap, robots.txt.
- Price: $150 – $600 USD
- Timeline: 3–7 business days

### Add-ons (à la carte)
- WhatsApp chat button: $30
- Cookie consent banner: $40
- Blog setup (static): $120 – $250
- Google Analytics setup: $50
- Multilingual (EN/ES): $150 – $400
- Additional page: $80 – $200
- Performance optimization: $100 – $300
- Hourly rate: $40/hr

## Terms

- Payment: 50% upfront, 50% on delivery
- Revisions: 2 rounds included; extra rounds at $40/hr
- Rights: Full ownership transferred to client on final payment
- Hosting: Not included — client provides domain and hosting
- Payment methods: Bank transfer, PayPal, Stripe
